case_title: LO, GERALD et al vs. NICHOLAS, TONY et al

docket_entries.description: 9/4/96 DEPT 5 JUDGE DESMOND CSR PDOWLING CLERK GMCGREW C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. WRITTEN AND ORAL TESTIMONY TAKEN ON THE RECORD. MATTER SUBMITED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICHOLAS, TONY NICHOLAS, ROSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1252 VALENCIA ST, #C, S.F, CA $2,058.10 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,543.10, LEASE FORFEITED
